---
title: "Project-1"
author: "Jasmine Cabrera"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Data

```{r}
#| warning: false
# load packages
library(tidytuesdayR)

# load data
cases_month <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_month.csv')
cases_year <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_year.csv')

head(cases_month)
```

```{r}
# checking NA
sum(apply(is.na(cases_month), 1, any))
colSums(is.na(cases_month))

# measles
cases_month[is.na(cases_month$rubella_clinical), ]
# rubella
cases_month[is.na(cases_month$rubella_clinical), ]

unique(cases_month$year)
```
